ExampleService
  DESCRIPTOR FLAGS:
      [SE_DACL_PRESENT]
      [SE_SELF_RELATIVE]
  OWNER: NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM
  [0] ACCESS_ALLOWED_ACE_TYPE: NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM
	SERVICE_QUERY_STATUS
	SERVICE_START
	READ_CONTROL
  [1] ACCESS_ALLOWED_ACE_TYPE: BUILTIN\Administrators
	SERVICE_ALL_ACCESS
  [2] ACCESS_DENIED_ACE_TYPE: NT AUTHORITY\NETWORK
          [INHERITED_ACE]
	SERVICE_STOP
  SACL:
  [0] : Everyone
          [FAILED_ACCESS_ACE_FLAG]
	SERVICE_ALL_ACCESS
